data.title: Rezolve Ai PLC transfers 10.6 million shares to new global investor, associated with late John Wagner's estate.
data.description: New York - On October 10, 2025, Rezolve Ai PLC (NASDAQ: RZLV) disclosed that DBLP Sea Cow Limited, a shareholder linked to the estate of the late John Wagner and Rezolve's Chairman and CEO Dan Wagner, has shifted ownership of 10.6 million ordinary shares of Rezolve Ai to a prominent new global long-term fundamentals-driven Institutional Investor.

data.title: Integrated Rail and Resources Acquisition Corp extends business combination deadline from Oct 15 to Nov 15, 2025.
data.description: In Winter Park, Florida on October 10, 2025, it was announced that Integrated Rail and Resources Acquisition Corp. received notice from their sponsor, DHIP Natural Resources Investments, LLC, regarding an extension of the deadline to finalize a business combination. The original deadline of October 15, 2025 has now been extended to November 15, 2025. This decision was made in accordance with the Investment Management Trust Agreement between the company and American Stock Transfer & Trust Company, LLC, with the agreement initially dated on November 11, 2021, and later amended on February 8, 2024.

data.title: Southside Bancshares, Inc. to release third quarter financial results on Oct. 24, 2025, with a conference call at 11:00 a.m. CDT.
data.description: In Tyler, Texas on October 10, 2025, Southside Bancshares, Inc. revealed plans to disclose its third-quarter financial figures prior to the market launch on Friday, October 24, 2025. Southside, the parent company of Southside Bank and listed on NYSE as SBSI, will conduct a conference call on the same day at 11:00 a.m. CDT to deliberate on the results.
USTR adjusts section 301 ships action, suggests more changes to action: statement

data.title: Greenhawk ends Greenland properties agreement with 1531323 BC Ltd. (CSE: GRHK) on Oct. 10, 2025.
data.description: The Canadian company Greenhawk Resources Inc. (CSE: GRHK) has announced the termination of the prior Option and Joint Venture Agreement with 1531323 BC Ltd. concerning the Greenland properties. The Agreement, dated May 21, 2025, has been dissolved, ending the partnership between the two parties.

data.title: Bluejay Diagnostics closes $4.5M private placement for 2.25M shares at $2 each, with Series F warrants included.
data.description: A medical diagnostics company, Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc. (NASDAQ: BJDX), based in ACTON, Mass., recently closed a private placement round. The round involved the purchase and sale of 2,250,000 shares of common stock (or pre-funded warrants) and Series F warrants allowing the purchase of up to 4,500,000 common stock shares. Each share was priced at $2.00, along with accompanying warrants. The Series F warrants have an exercise price of $1.75 per share and can be exercised immediately post-issuance. These warrants are valid for five and a half years from the date of issuance.

data.title: KB Home announces grand opening of community in Denton, Texas.
data.description: KB Home has recently revealed the grand debut of its latest residential community in Denton, Texas. This new community is established on the cornerstone of fostering relationships and is part of the company's ongoing commitment to serving the vibrant Denton area. The unveiling marks an important milestone for KB Home as they continue to expand their presence in Texas.

data.title: POMDOCTOR LIMITED reports underwriter exercises full over-allotment option in IPO, Nasdaq: POM. #China #MedicalServices
data.description: On October 10, 2025, POMDOCTOR LIMITED (Nasdaq: POM), a prominent online medical services provider specializing in chronic disease management in China, based in Guangzhou, revealed that the underwriter for its initial public offering (IPO) has fully exercised their option. This move marks a significant development for the Company.

data.title: University of Phoenix introduces a cybersecurity pathway for working adults, emphasizing EC-Council competencies, allowing learners to showcase practical skills.
data.description: Today, the University of Phoenix introduced a new cybersecurity pathway tailored for adult professionals seeking career-focused training. This program consists of micro-credentials centered around practical skills, catering to those in the cybersecurity field. The pathway acknowledges the completion of specific University of Phoenix courses and validates skills aligned with EC-Council competency areas. This helps individuals showcase their abilities rather than just course completion. This initiative is part of the University's collaboration with an educational alliance.

data.title: Hydro One (TSX: H) to release Q3 2025 results on Nov 13 before markets open. Teleconference set for 8am ET.
data.description: Leading electric transmission and distribution utility in Ontario, Hydro One Limited (TSX: H), has announced it will host an investment community teleconference on November 13, 2025, at 8 a.m. ET. The company is set to disclose its third-quarter financial results on the morning of the same day.

data.title: Military Veteran & Author Benjamin N. Carrasquillo challenges interpretations of ancient Yisra'elite in new Bible study.
data.description: Woodbridge, VA - On October 10, 2025, Benjamin N. Carrasquillo, a military veteran and author, presented a thought-provoking challenge to current interpretations of scripture. He highlighted the prevalent feeling among believers and non-believers alike that there may be deeper meanings hidden within the text. Carrasquillo's remarks generated significant interest among the public and sparked discussions surrounding the topic of biblical interpretation.

data.title: Acadian Timber Corp to release 2025 Q3 results on Oct 29, followed by conference call on Oct 30 at 1:00 p.m. ET. Website: www.acadiantimber.com/financial-information
data.description: Acadian Timber Corp, based in Edmundston, New Brunswick, is set to unveil its 2025 third quarter results on October 29, 2025, post-market closure. Interested parties can access the report on the company's website at www.acadiantimber.com/financial-information/. To delve deeper into the financial and operational performance, a conference call and webcast have been scheduled for October 30, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time, where senior management will elaborate on the results.

data.title: RAM Enterprise, Inc. partners with Vayeron Pty Ltd for smart conveyor monitoring technology - Oct. 10, 2025.
data.description: In Elko, Nevada, on October 10, 2025, RAM Enterprise, Inc., a prominent provider of conveyor and maintenance solutions, revealed a new collaboration with Vayeron Pty Ltd, a top producer of intelligent conveyor monitoring technology. This partnership marks a significant move in the industry as it brings together the expertise of RAM Enterprise and the innovative technology of Vayeron. The partnership is expected to enhance conveyor operations and maintenance efficiencies, benefiting numerous industries.

data.title: Lanvin Group's CFO David Chan steps down on Oct. 27, 2025, as announced in Shanghai; big change for luxury fashion group.
data.description: In Shanghai on October 10, 2025, Lanvin Group (NYSE: LANV), a renowned luxury fashion group, disclosed that Mr. David Chan, their Executive President and Chief Financial Officer, will be resigning from his role on October 27, 2025.

data.title: AES declares $0.17595/share quarterly dividend, payable on Nov 14, 2025 to shareholders of record on Oct 31, 2025.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, The AES Corporation announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.17595 per share for shareholders of record as of October 31, 2025. This dividend will be payable on November 14, 2025. The announcement was made by the Board of Directors of The AES Corporation, listed on the NYSE as AES.
